channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Congressman Expresses Concerns Over Proposed Changes to India's FCRA Ahead of Rubio Visit
item.description: Ahead of US Secretary of State Marco Rubio's upcoming visit to India, American Congressman Chris Smith has urged him to raise concerns over the proposed amendments to India’s Foreign Contribution Regu...

item.title: Agbu Kefas Wins APC Governorship Primary in Taraba State
item.description: Na so Agbu Kefas don finally emerge as di governorship candidate for APC for Taraba state after him collect total votes of 166,357. Him main opponent, Muazu Jaji, wey be former minister of state for t...

item.title: Kenyan Court Hears Case of Three People Accused of Fraud and Tax Evasion
item.description: This week in Kenya, three people were taken to court over allegations of fraud and tax evasion amounting to 171 million Kenyan shillings. The suspects are accused of deliberately avoiding tax obligati...

item.title: Alex Eala gains strong local support ahead of French Open
item.description: Filipino tennis sensation Alex Eala is generating increasing attention as she prepares for her upcoming campaign at the French Open, one of the four Grand Slam tournaments. Fans and sports enthusiasts...

item.title: Government Publishes Watchlist of 28 High-Priority Illegal Waste Sites in England
item.description: The Environment Agency (EA) has identified nearly 30 major illegal waste sites in England, each containing tens of thousands of tonnes of rubbish, in a newly published watchlist. The list of 117 'high...

item.title: Three people killed in head-on car crash in Gymea Bay
item.description: In the early hours of Saturday morning, a tragic head-on collision claimed the lives of three people in southern Sydney. Police were initially called to a property in Gymea Bay to conduct a welfare ch...

item.title: SpaceX Prepares Starship V3 for Key Test Flight with Upgrades and New Safety Measures
item.description: SpaceX is preparing for the 12th test flight of its Starship megarocket, debuting the upgraded Starship V3 prototype. Scheduled as early as 6:30 p.m. ET, this flight marks the first launch since the f...

item.title: Organisations and Former Officials Raise Concerns Over CJI’s Remarks on Environmental Activists
item.description: In New Delhi, various organisations and a group of former civil servants have voiced concern over recent remarks made by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant regarding environmental litigations. During a...

item.title: Fubara Assures Rivers Residents of Ongoing Projects Despite Dropping Re-Election Bid
item.description: The Governor of Rivers State, Siminalayi Fubara, don assure residents say him administration go continue to complete ongoing infrastructural projects even after political wahala wey make am drop him r...

item.title: Josh Boutwood Reopens Osteria at Balmori with New Dining Experience
item.description: Josh Boutwood, the acclaimed chef known for his innovative culinary creations, has officially reopened his Osteria at Balmori. This restaurant, celebrated for its unique blend of classic Italian techn...

item.title: SGF Akume Rejects Allegations of Election Material Diversion in Benue APC Primaries
item.description: The Secretary to the Government of the Federation (SGF), George Akume, don clear say all those talk wey dem dey yarn about him diverting electoral materials during the APC primaries for Benue State na...

item.title: NCW directs TCS to strengthen internal committees and PoSH compliance across all units
item.description: The National Commission for Women (NCW) has recently issued a directive to Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) to set up separate internal committees in all of its 127 units that employ ten or more staff,...

item.title: Federal Judge Dismisses Charges Against Alleged Human Smuggler Kilmar Abrego Garcia
item.description: Kilmar Armando Ábrego García, a Salvadoran national accused of human smuggling and alleged ties to the MS-13 gang, has had charges dismissed by a federal judge in Nashville. Ábrego García was indicted...

item.title: Netflix’s 'Apex': A Tense Survival Thriller with Charlize Theron and Taron Egerton
item.description: Netflix’s latest survival thriller, 'Apex', directed by Baltasar Kormákur, delivers a fast-paced and intense story, though it leans heavily on familiar survival movie tropes. The film follows Sasha (C...

item.title: Red Arrows to reduce aircraft in displays to extend fleet lifespan
item.description: The Royal Air Force's iconic aerobatics team, the Red Arrows, will reduce the number of aircraft used in most of their displays to preserve their ageing fleet of Hawk T1 jets. Pilots will fly in a nin...

item.title: Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' Concludes with Highest Weeknight Viewership in His Tenure
item.description: Stephen Colbert's 'The Late Show' concluded on May 22, 2026, with a record-breaking finale, attracting an average of 6.74 million viewers, surpassing even his premiere in 2015. The finale, which featu...

item.title: Lewis Hine’s Photographs Reveal Harsh Realities of Child Labor in Early 20th Century American Coal Mines
item.description: Lewis Hine, a teacher and pioneering social reform photographer, used his camera to expose the brutal realities of child labor in the United States during the early 1900s. Working for the National Chi...

item.title: Government Introduces Measures to Stabilize Prices of Essential Commodities
item.description: The Tanzanian government has unveiled a detailed strategy to manage the rising prices of basic commodities, addressing growing concerns about the increasing cost of living. Authorities plan to monitor...

item.title: Global Ocean Observing System at Risk Amid Growing Climate Demands
item.description: The Global Ocean Observing System (GOOS), a worldwide network of instruments including Argo floats, moored buoys, research vessels, underwater gliders, and sensor-equipped marine animals, provides cri...

item.title: Georgia GOP Senate Campaign Removes Controversial Post Referencing Adviser’s Past Trauma
item.description: The Senate campaign of Republican Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) removed a highly controversial social media post that referenced former NBC anchor Matt Lauer in a way that critics said was insensitive to t...
